title: aosheep's Infinity Gauntlet
description: Adds the Infinity Gauntlet, tools, weapons, and abilities.
body:
# Overview
This project aims to add new, powerful, later-game content in the form of strong tools, weapons, and the Infinity Gauntlet. The Gauntlet grants access to many abilities, some destructive and harmful while others serve only for convenience's sake. A comprehensive wiki is able to be found [here](https://github.com/aosheep/gauntlet/blob/main/README.md).

## Resource Pack
All datapack versions have an attached, required resource pack that should be used with the datapack for the intended experience. Go to the Versions tab and click the version you want to see both files. The resource pack will not download if you just select the download button on a datapack version.

The '+mod' versions have the resource pack included in them already.
